overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a large eagle flying through a snowy alpine valley. The bird navigates between snow-covered pine trees and follows a winding river through the mountainous landscape under bright midday sun, eventually reaching a wider mountain lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy river valley with dense pine forest

agents.ego_description: large eagle flying low over the river, navigating between snow-covered pine trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with heavy snow on branches lining the left bank
tall evergreen trees with heavy snow on branches lining the right bank
flowing river with dark water cutting through the snow-covered valley
snow-dusted rocky outcrop rising above the tree line
distant mountain peaks covered in white snow under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies low through a narrow snowy valley, weaving between snow-laden pine trees that line both sides of a flowing river. The camera follows closely behind as the bird navigates the terrain with rocky cliffs visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain valley with scattered forest

events.description: eagle gains altitude and the valley opens up to reveal wider mountain vistas

agents.ego_description: eagle climbing higher while following the river's winding path through the valley, gaining a broader view of the terrain

segments.scene_description: As the eagle ascends, the perspective widens to show the river snaking through the snow-covered valley below. The dense pine forest spreads out beneath the bird while distant mountain peaks frame the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine lake with surrounding snow-covered peaks

events.description: river widens into a mountain lake with a visible waterfall cascading down the left cliff face
eagle banks left while gliding over the open water surface

agents.ego_description: eagle banking left and gliding over the wider lake surface, wings fully extended

entered.detail: wider body of dark water with snow-covered banks and rocky edges
water cascading down the rocky cliff face into the valley below

segments.scene_description: The river opens into a wider mountain lake, revealing a waterfall on the left cliff. The eagle banks left, gliding low over the dark water with snow-covered shores and distant peaks surrounding the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lake and snowy shoreline approach

events.description: eagle descends toward the snowy shoreline, preparing to land or fly at lower altitude

agents.ego_description: eagle flying lower over the water approaching the snowy shoreline with wings adjusting for descent

entered.detail: snow-covered bank with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The eagle continues over the lake before descending toward the snowy shoreline. The waterfall disappears from view behind as the bird approaches the near shore, with the water surface filling the lower frame and snow-covered terrain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a narrow, forested valley and expands into a wide, open mountain lake. It begins with the camera trailing closely behind an eagle as it weaves low between snow-laden pine trees and rocky cliffs along a flowing river. As the bird ascends, the perspective widens to reveal the river snaking through the dense forest below, framed by distant mountain peaks on the horizon. The scene then opens further as the river flows into a vast lake, where the eagle banks left to glide past a waterfall cascading down a cliffside. Finally, the bird descends toward the snowy shoreline, with the dark water filling the lower frame as the waterfall recedes behind it.
